clusters.notes: General-purpose text, code, and multimodal (ColPali-style visual document) embedding models for MTEB benchmarks, semantic search, and visual document retrieval.

clusters.label: NemoRetriever Reranker Models
clusters.notes: Cross-encoder rerankers for text and visual document retrieval pipelines.

clusters.label: DRAGON Multi-turn Retrieval Encoders
clusters.notes: Dual-encoder retrieval models for multi-turn conversational contexts and queries.

clusters.label: Audio Flamingo & Music Flamingo Audio-Language Models
clusters.notes: Audio-language and music-language models supporting audio understanding, captioning, QA, ASR, and chain-of-thought reasoning.

clusters.label: Parakeet & Canary ASR Models
clusters.notes: Comprehensive English and multilingual ASR model families using FastConformer, Conformer, Citrinet, and Canary architectures with CTC, RNNT, and TDT decoders. Includes multi-speaker/diarization and streaming variants.

clusters.label: NeMo Multilingual ASR Models
clusters.notes: NeMo-framework ASR models covering Spanish, French, German, Arabic, Russian, Ukrainian, Chinese, and many other languages using FastConformer, Conformer, and Citrinet architectures.

clusters.label: Speaker Diarization, Verification & Speech Enhancement
clusters.notes: NeMo-based speaker diarization (SortFormer), speaker verification (TitaNet), self-supervised speech (NEST), and speech enhancement/super-resolution models.

clusters.label: BigVGAN Neural Vocoders & Audio Codecs
clusters.notes: GAN-based neural vocoders (BigVGAN) for high-fidelity audio synthesis and neural audio codec models for speech compression and tokenization at various sample rates and bitrates.

clusters.label: TTS Models (FastPitch, HiFi-GAN, Magpie)
clusters.notes: English TTS pipeline (FastPitch acoustic model + HiFi-GAN vocoder) and multilingual Magpie TTS synthesis model from NeMo/Riva.

clusters.label: Audio2Emotion & Audio2Face Models
clusters.notes: ONNX-based models for emotion recognition from audio and 3D facial animation driven by audio input.

clusters.label: BioNeMo Protein & Molecular Foundation Models
clusters.notes: Protein language models (ESM2, AMPLIFY), protein structure/generation models, and small molecule generation/retrosynthesis/binding models for drug discovery and biological research.

clusters.label: BioNeMo Genomics & RNA Models
clusters.notes: Single-cell genomics foundation models (Geneformer), codon/DNA language models, and RNA protein foundation models for biological sequence modeling.

clusters.label: Medical Imaging Models (Segmentation, Generation, Reasoning)
clusters.notes: MONAI/VISTA3D-based CT/MRI segmentation, latent diffusion models for synthetic medical image generation, chest X-ray reasoning VLM (Qwen2.5-VL-based), and MRI reconstruction models.

clusters.label: Cosmos Surgical World Models
clusters.notes: Medical/surgical video generation world models and tokenizers for surgical robotics simulation and policy evaluation.

clusters.label: Weather & Climate Forecasting Models
clusters.notes: Atmospheric/weather forecasting neural models (FourCastNet, DLESyM) trained on ERA5/HRRR and GOES/MRMS climate data.

clusters.label: Mamba2 / Hymba / Retro Hybrid Architecture LLMs
clusters.notes: State-space model (SSM) and hybrid Mamba-attention architecture language models, including Mamba2 base models, Hymba hybrid small LLMs, and retrieval-augmented InstructRetro models.

clusters.label: NeMo Megatron Base Models (GPT, T5, BERT)
clusters.notes: Earlier generation Megatron-LM pretrained base models including GPT, T5, mT5, BERT, and Mamba2 SSM variants, as well as large GPT-OSS and MoE reasoning models.

clusters.label: NemoCurator Data Quality & Domain Classifiers
clusters.notes: BERT/DeBERTa-based classifiers for educational content quality filtering, text domain classification, and speech bandwidth filtering for data curation pipelines.

clusters.label: 3D Scene Understanding & Generation Models
clusters.notes: 3D panoptic scene understanding models for indoor environments and 3D part packing/generation research models.

clusters.label: Video Relighting & Diffusion Rendering
clusters.notes: Diffusion-based models for video relighting/inverse rendering, forward/inverse diffusion rendering (Cosmos-based), and HDR lighting estimation.

clusters.label: Miscellaneous Research Accessories
clusters.notes: Diverse research accessories including human pose/motion estimation (GEM-X), grouping-based vision-language models (GroupViT), Hebrew CLIP (HebCLIP), QDQBERT quantized BERT, frame VAD, and Isaac Lab simulation environments.

Qwen (Alibaba DAMO).summary: Qwen (Alibaba DAMO) maintains one of the broadest open model portfolios in the industry, spanning multiple generations of general-purpose LLMs (Qwen1 through Qwen3/3.5) in dense and MoE architectures, specialized models for code, math, vision, audio, and omni-modal tasks, and a rich set of pipeline accessories including embeddings, rerankers, reward models, safety guards, ASR, and TTS — with nearly every model released in extensive quantized variants (AWQ, GPTQ, GGUF, FP8, MLX) for broad hardware coverage.

clusters.label: Qwen1 & Qwen1.5 general LLMs (dense)
clusters.notes: First- and second-generation dense general-purpose LLMs spanning 0.5B–110B parameters in base and chat variants with Int4/Int8/AWQ/GGUF/GPTQ quantization; bilingual zh/en focus.

clusters.label: Qwen1.5 MoE general LLMs
clusters.notes: Mixture-of-Experts variant of Qwen1.5 with 14.3B total / 2.7B active parameters, with quantized variants.

clusters.label: Qwen2 general LLMs (dense)
clusters.notes: Third-generation dense general-purpose LLMs at 0.5B–72B scales with instruct tuning and multiple quantization/runtime formats including MLX for Apple Silicon.

clusters.label: Qwen2 MoE general LLMs
clusters.notes: Qwen2 MoE model with 57.4B total / 14B active parameters, with base and instruct variants.

clusters.label: Qwen2.5 general LLMs (dense)
clusters.notes: Fourth-generation dense general-purpose LLMs spanning 0.5B–72B; includes 1M-token long-context variants at 7B and 14B, with extensive AWQ/GPTQ/GGUF quantization.

clusters.label: Qwen3 dense general LLMs (base and instruct)
clusters.notes: Qwen3 dense general-purpose LLMs at 0.6B–32B scales with base and instruction-tuned variants, plus extensive quantization (FP8, GGUF, GPTQ, AWQ, MLX).

clusters.label: Qwen3 MoE general LLMs
clusters.notes: Sparse MoE Qwen3 models at 30B-A3B and 235B-A22B scales, including base, instruct, and chain-of-thought reasoning (Thinking-2507) variants with extensive quantization.

clusters.label: Qwen3 4B & 8B general LLM series (with safety/RL variants)
clusters.notes: Full families of 4B and 8B general-purpose models including base, instruct, thinking (reasoning), and safety-RL fine-tuned variants with multiple quantized/format options.

clusters.label: Qwen3 Next 80B MoE general LLMs
clusters.notes: 80B sparse MoE general-purpose models with instruct and thinking (reasoning) variants plus quantized formats.

clusters.label: Qwen3.5 dense general LLMs
clusters.notes: Dense transformer models from 2B to 27B parameters supporting image-text-to-text (multimodal). Includes base and instruction-tuned variants plus FP8/GPTQ quantized versions.

clusters.label: Qwen3.5 MoE general LLMs
clusters.notes: MoE variants of Qwen3.5 at 35B-A3B, 122B-A10B, and 397B-A17B scales supporting image-text-to-text. Includes base, instruct, FP8, and GPTQ-Int4 quantized variants.

clusters.label: CodeQwen / Qwen2.5-Coder series
clusters.notes: Code-specialized LLMs spanning CodeQwen1.5 (7B) through Qwen2.5-Coder (0.5B–32B), each with base and instruction-tuned variants plus AWQ/GPTQ/GGUF quantization.

clusters.label: Qwen3 Coder series (MoE and dense)
clusters.notes: Sparse MoE and dense code-specialized models at 30B-A3B, 480B-A35B, and ~80B scales with base and instruct variants targeting agentic coding tasks.

clusters.label: Qwen2-Math & Qwen2.5-Math series
clusters.notes: Math-specialized generative LLMs at 1.5B, 7B, and 72B scales across Qwen2 and Qwen2.5 generations, with base and instruct variants.

clusters.label: QwQ reasoning series
clusters.notes: Dedicated chain-of-thought reasoning model line at 32B scale, fine-tuned from Qwen2.5-32B. Includes preview, final, and AWQ/GGUF quantized variants.

clusters.label: Qwen-VL & Qwen2-VL series
clusters.notes: First- and second-generation vision-language models at 2B–72B scales supporting image+text input, with base, instruct, and quantized variants.

clusters.label: Qwen2.5-VL series
clusters.notes: Vision-language instruction-tuned models at 3B, 7B, 32B, and 72B scales, each with an AWQ quantized variant.

clusters.label: QVQ visual reasoning model
clusters.notes: Large 72B vision-language model fine-tuned from Qwen2-VL-72B, focused on visual chain-of-thought reasoning.

clusters.label: Qwen3 VL vision-language series
clusters.notes: Dense (2B–32B) and sparse MoE (30B, 235B) vision-language models with instruct and thinking (reasoning) variants plus quantized formats.

clusters.label: Qwen3.5 multimodal base series
clusters.notes: Early Qwen3.5 generation small multimodal models at 0.8B scale; classified as image-text-to-text.

clusters.label: Qwen-Audio & Qwen2-Audio series
clusters.notes: Audio-language models supporting audio+text input for speech understanding and audio conversation tasks in zh/en.

clusters.label: Qwen2.5-Omni & Qwen3-Omni series
clusters.notes: Any-to-any multimodal models supporting text, image, audio, and video inputs/outputs. Qwen2.5-Omni at 3B/7B; Qwen3-Omni as MoE with instruct, thinking, and captioner variants.

clusters.label: Qwen image generation series
clusters.notes: Diffusion-based text-to-image and image editing models using custom Qwen pipelines; includes layered image generation variants.

clusters.label: Qwen3Guard safety models
clusters.notes: Generative safety/guard models fine-tuned from Qwen3 base models at 0.6B, 4B, and 8B scales for detecting and responding to unsafe content.

clusters.label: Math reward / process reward models
clusters.notes: Process reward models (PRM) and outcome reward models (RM) for math reasoning pipelines supporting RLHF and inference-time best-of-N search.

clusters.label: WorldPM reward / preference models
clusters.notes: Large 72B reward/preference models built on Qwen2, fine-tuned on diverse preference datasets (HelpSteer2, RLHFFlow, UltraFeedback) for post-training alignment.

clusters.label: Qwen3Guard Stream embedding-based safety
clusters.notes: Feature-extraction (embedding) variants of Qwen3Guard safety models producing representations for safety classification pipelines rather than generating text.

clusters.label: Qwen3 text embedding models
clusters.notes: Text embedding models at 0.6B, 4B, and 8B scales derived from Qwen3 base models, with GGUF quantized variants.

clusters.label: Qwen3 text reranker models
clusters.notes: Text reranking models at 0.6B, 4B, and 8B scales fine-tuned from Qwen3 base models.

clusters.label: Qwen3 VL multimodal embedding and reranker models
clusters.notes: Multimodal embedding and reranking models derived from Qwen3-VL supporting both image and text inputs.

clusters.label: Qwen3 ASR (speech recognition) models
clusters.notes: Automatic speech recognition models at 0.6B and 1.7B scales; ForcedAligner is a specialized ASR alignment tool.

clusters.label: Qwen3 TTS (text-to-speech) models
clusters.notes: Text-to-speech models at 0.6B and 1.7B scales with custom voice cloning and voice design variants; includes a speech codec tokenizer.

clusters.label: Qwen tokenizer utility
clusters.notes: Standalone tokenizer artifact, not a generative model.
